notes.allergy_notice: Please inform us if you have any allergies. While we do our best to reduce the risk of cross-contamination, we cannot guarantee that any of our dishes are free from allergens and therefore cannot accept any liability in this respect.
notes.service_charge: An additional service of 10% will be added to tables of 4 and more.
